effect: Whenever Amon applies a Status Effect, he gains increased Gun Damage for a Duration. This effect can stack.
Amon gains Melee Critical Hit Chance.
Amon becomes immune to all Damage for a brief Duration whenever he activates a Forgeskill.

Melee Damage and Ordnance Damage have a chance to apply Weakness to enemies for a Duration. Weakened enemies deal reduced Damage, and take increased Damage. Weakness is affected by Status Effect Duration, and is itself considered a Status Effect.
Amon gains increased Maximum Shield Capacity and Maximum Overshield Capacity.
Kill Skill. Amon gains increased Shield Regeneration Rate and Movement Speed for a Duration. This effect can stack.
Whenever Amon deals Gun Damage, he gains increased Action Skill Cooldown Rate for a Duration. This effect can stack.

Whenever Onslaughter is activated, Amon fully Restores his Health and Shield, and is surrounded by a Forgestorm that deals Incendiary Status Effect Damage to nearby enemies over time. Kill Skill. Killing an enemy inside of the Forgestorm restores Amon's Action Skill Duration, and increases Forgestorm's Damage.
Amon gains Overshield whenever he deals Melee Damage.

Rocket Punch now has two modes, gains increased Radius, and deals Bonus Damage based on Amon's Maximum Shield Capacity. Pressing Action Skill causes Rocket Punch to deal Incendiary Melee Attack Damage. Pressing Melee causes Rocket Punch to deal Cryo Melee Attack Damage.
Amon gains increased Melee Damage and Skill Damage.
Amon gains increased Incendiary Damage.
Amon gains increased Status Effect Damage and Status Effect Duration.

Amon gains increased Movement Speed for a Duration after damaging an enemy with a Forgeaxe, and can Detonate Primed enemies with a Melee Attack. Detonating a Flame Axe restores Action Skill Cooldown. Detonating a Cryo Axe restores Ordnance Cooldown.
Whenever Amon Activates his Forgeskill, he gains increased Gun Damage for a Duration.
Whenever Amon Reloads, his Guns gain Bonus Shock Damage for a Duration.
Amon gains increased Forgeskill Cooldown Rate and Gun Handling.
Amon gains increased Forgeskill Damage and Detonation Damage.
Primed enemies take increased Gun Damage for each stack of Prime. If Amon Detonates a Primed enemy, a new Forgeaxe is spawned that seeks out a nearby enemy.
Amon gains increased Critical Hit Damage. The effect is Doubled for a Duration after dealing Melee Damage.
Kill Skill. Amon deals increased Elemental Damage for a Duration. This effect can stack.
Amon gains increased Reload Speed. The effect is Doubled for a Duration after causing a Detonation.
Amon gains increased Shock Damage.

Forgedrone Skill. Whenever Amon activates his Forgeskill, he spawns an Axe Forgedrone that attacks nearby enemies for a Duration, dealing Incendiary Melee Damage. Activating a Forgeskill while Tempered Pyre is active fully Restores the Duration of all active Forgedrones.
Tempered Pyre now spawns an additional Axe Forgedrone that deals Cryo Melee Damage. Forgedrones from Tempered Pyre have reduced Duration.
Kill Skill. Amon gains Critical Hit Chance with Guns for a Duration. This effect can stack.
Amon deals increased Cryo Damage.
Amon gains increased Gun Damage the more Full his Health. This effect is Doubled while Amon is at Maximum Health.
Forgewaves now consume more Vengeance and explode on impact, dealing Cryo Ordnance Damage in an area. Explosion Radius is further increased if the Forgewave passes through Firewall.
Amon's Gun Shots have a Chance to Ricochet as an Elemental Shard, dealing Cryo Damage.

While Scourge is active, Amon Taunts enemies and sends out a Cryonic Pulse every second, dealing Cryo Damage to enemies, and restoring Allies' Health. While Aiming, Amon's Movement Speed is reduced, but Amon gains Bonus Cryo Damage with Guns and consumes Vengeance on each Gun Shot.
Amon gains increased Action Skill Duration and Gun Swap Speed.
Kill Skill. Amon Restores a percentage of Ordnance Cooldown.
Amon gains increased Maximum Health Capacity and Repkit Healing.
Amon gains increased Ordnance Damage and Magazine Size.

Whenever Amon deals Ordnance Damage, there is a Chance to apply a Cryo Status Effect that deals Cryo Damage over time for a Duration. Tail of the Comet is affected by Status Effect Application Chance.
Amon gains Missing Health Regeneration. Every time Amon takes or absorbs Non-Status Effect Damage, he gains a Stack of Resolute for a Duration, which increases this effect.
Whenever Amon uses a Repkit while his Action Skill is active, partially restore Action Skill Duration.
Amon gains increased Status Effect Application Chance and Cryo Effectiveness. This effect is Doubled when his Action Skill is active.
Whenever Amon activates his Forgeskill, he becomes Berserk for a Duration, gaining Slow Immunity, and Bonus Cryo Damage with Gun Damage and Melee Damage.
Whenever Amon's Shield Breaks, he gains Bloodlust for a Duration, gaining increased Reload Speed and Lifesteal. Bloodlust is also activated on Action Skill Activation.
Amon gains increased Maximum Health Capacity and deals increased Melee Damage the more full his Health.

Pressing Action Skill immediately after a Rocket Punch causes Amon to use a follow-up attack, dealing Cryo Melee Attack Damage in a large area in front of Amon. Non-Boss enemies hit below 25% Total HP are killed.

Molten Slam is now Hoarcleave. Press and hold Action Skill to swing a Massive Forgeaxe, launching a Forgewave that deals Cryo Melee Damage and Freezes enemies it passes through. Enemies killed by Hoarcleave cause a Detonation, dealing Cryo Damage.
Whenever Amon deals Melee Damage, there is a chance to Activate Kill Skills.
Whenever Amon's Shield Breaks, he partially Restores Shield and Detonates, dealing Cryo Damage to all nearby enemies and Freezing them.
Kill Skill. Whenever Amon kills an enemy while Berserk is active, partially restore Berserk's Duration, and increase Bonus Cryo Damage from Berserk.
Amon gains increased Ordnance Damage and Detonation Radius.
Grenades have a Chance to refund themselves on use. Heavy Ordnance have a Chance to refund 1 Ammo on damaging enemies.

Amon now readies Forgehammers, choosing Frost or Shock. Enemies damaged by Forgehammer are Primed for a Duration, and will Detonate when they die or are damaged by a Forgeskill, dealing Damage to nearby enemies. Can throw a Cryo Hammer, dealing Cryo Melee Damage in an area on impact, or a Shock Hammer, dealing Shock Melee Damage in an area on impact.
Forgedrones gain increased Damage and Duration.
Hammer Forgedrones now deal Ordnance Damage in addition to their other types and gain a Chance to cause a Detonation on damaging enemies, dealing Cryo Damage in an area.

Double-Edge is now Snowmaul. Press and hold Action Skill to throw a Twinned Forgehammer, dealing Cryo Melee Damage to nearby enemies on impact that Ricochets between nearby enemies up to 3 times. If no Ricochet targets are found, it deals Damage an additional time before destroying itself. For each Detonation caused, it Ricochets an additional time.
Whenever Amon deals Ordnance Damage, he gains increased Fire Rate for a Duration. This effect can stack.
Forgedrone Skill. Whenever Amon activates his Ordnance, he spawns a Hammer Forgedrone that attacks nearby enemies for a Duration, dealing Cryo Melee Damage.
Amon gains Overshield when he deals Ordnance Damage.
Kill Skill. Killing an enemy with Incendiary Damage will grant a Stack of Flame Affinity for a Duration. Flame Affinity Stacks grant increased Reload Speed and Action Skill Cooldown Rate.
Kill Skill. Partially Restore Worldbreaker's Cooldown.
Whenever Amon applies Burning to an enemy, he gains increased Fire Rate for a Duration. This effect can stack.

Forgewave is now Molten Rebuke. Press Action Skill to Consume all Vengeance and throw the Forgeshield at target enemy, dealing Incendiary Ordnance Damage, and Ricocheting on impact. Molten Rebuke Ricochets additional times based on Vengeance consumed. Whenever the Forgeshield is thrown, Damage Absorption is Disabled until it returns.

Firewall is now a Ring that deals Incendiary Status Effect Damage to enemies inside of it, and Cryo Damage to enemies who enter or leave. Firewall grants Friendly Projectiles that pass through it further increased Damage and Projectile Speed.
Amon gains increased Ricochet Damage, Burning Damage, and Burning Duration.

Whenever Amon Ground Slams, he consumes all Flame Affinity Stacks to create a Flame Fissure in front of him, dealing Incendiary Melee Damage to all enemies hit. Worldbreaker deals Bonus Damage for each Stack of Flame Affinity consumed.
Amon gains increased Fire Rate and Status Effect Chance the more full his Shields.

While Onslaughter is active, Gun Damage dealt to enemies will Prime them for a Duration, and will Detonate when they die or are damaged by a Forgeskill, dealing Incendiary Damage to nearby enemies. Detonations can also be caused by Melee Attack Damage, but deal less Damage. This effect can stack.
Kill Skill. Amon gains increased Melee Damage and Maximum Shield Capacity for a Duration. This effect can stack.
Amon gains increased Damage Dealt and Damage Reduction based on his distance from the enemy. The closer the enemy, the greater the bonus.

Gun Critical Hits have a chance to apply Weakness to enemies for a Duration. Weakened enemies deal reduced Damage, and take increased Damage. Weakness is affected by Status Effect Duration, and is itself considered a Status Effect.
Pyres deal additional Incendiary Melee Damage based on Damage Stored by Molten Slam, distributed among the remaining targets.
Whenever Amon kills a Weakened enemy, they Detonate, dealing Incendiary Melee Damage to nearby enemies.
Whenever Amon deals Damage with a Melee Attack, his current Gun has its Ammo partially refilled.
Amon gains Overshield when he deals Action Skill Damage.

Amon now readies Forgeswords, choosing Flame or Shock. Whenever activated, consume all Charges to launch a Barrage of Forgeswords. Enemies damaged by Forgeswords are Primed for a Duration, and will Detonate when they die or are damaged by a Forgeskill dealing Damage to the target, but none to nearby enemies. Can fire a Barrage of Flame Swords, dealing Incendiary Melee Damage, or a Barrage of Shock Swords, dealing Shock Melee Damage. This effect can stack.
Whenever Amon or his Forgedrones Critically Hit an enemy or cause a Detonation, he gains increased Damage Dealt for a Duration. Detonations grant multiple Stacks.
Forgedrones gain increased Attack Speed and Movement Speed.
Forgedrones have a Chance to Critically Hit. Whenever a Forgedrone Critically Hits, they partially restore Amon's Action Skill Cooldown.
Amon's Gun Shots have a Chance on Critical Hit to spawn an Elemental Bolt, dealing Shock Damage.

Double-Edge is now Storm Surge. Press and hold Action Skill to throw a Twinned Forgeblade, dealing Shock Melee Damage in an area on impact. Storm Surge creates a Forgestorm on impact for a Duration, dealing Shock Status Effect Damage over time.

Forgedrone Skill. Whenever Amon activates his Action Skill, he spawns a Sword Forgedrone that attacks nearby enemies for a Duration, dealing Shock Melee Damage. Activating an Action Skill while Tempered Lightning is active will partially Restore the Duration of all active Forgedrones.
Amon deals increased Damage to Frozen enemies and Bosses.
Elemental Shard has a Chance to Ricochet.

Forgewaves now partially restore Action Skill Duration and Firewall Duration on damaging enemies, and can be activated three times in succession. The third activation launches a Massive Forgewave that deals increased Damage and does not consume Vengeance.

Firewall is now Glacial Rapture. Press and hold Action Skill to swing Forgewhips, dealing Cryo Ordnance Damage over 2 Hits to nearby enemies before slamming into the ground, creating a Cryonic Fissure that deals Cryo Ordnance Damage and leaves Cryo Hazards for a Duration.
Kill Skill. Killing an enemy with Cryo Damage will grant a Stack of Cryo Affinity for a Duration. Cryo Affinity Stacks grant increased Gun Damage.
Amon's Gun Critical Hits have a Chance to apply additional Slow to enemies, as if dealt Cryo Damage. Chance is Doubled while his Action Skill is active.
Whenever Amon applies a Status Effect to an enemy, there is a Chance to partially restore his Shield and Ammo.
Whenever Amon deals Ordnance Damage, he consumes a Stack of Cryo Affinity for each nearby enemy to spawn an Elemental Shard, dealing Cryo Damage in an area.

Whenever Amon applies Shock to an enemy, he gains increased Critical Hit Chance for a Duration. Whenever Amon applies Burning to an enemy, he gains increased Critical Hit Damage for a Duration. Both effects stack separately.
Amon gains increased Status Effect Damage and Ordnance Damage based on his Shields. The fuller his Shield, the greater the effect.

Whenever Amon Activates his Ordnance, his next Gun Shot is converted to Incendiary Damage, Staggering damaged enemies, and gaining increased Damage Dealt. Bosses cannot be Staggered, and Badasses have a chance to be Staggered.
Whenever Amon Burns an enemy, he also Shocks them. Whenever Amon Shocks an enemy, he also Burns them.
Whenever Amon deals Melee Damage, Restore a percentage of Forgeskill Cooldown. Melee Attacks Double this effect.
Amon gains increased Status Effect Chance while Onslaughter is active. Pressing Action Skill launches a concentrated Lightning Wave that deals Shock Melee Attack Damage to enemies it passes through.
Amon deals increased Melee Damage to enemies below 50% total HP.

Molten Slam is now Stormcutter. Press and hold Action Skill to swing a Massive Forgesword, launching a Forgewave that deals Shock Melee Damage to all enemies it passes through. Restore Action Skill Cooldown, Action Skill Duration, and Ordnance Cooldown for each enemy hit.

Double-Edge now deals Incendiary Melee Damage in both directions, gains increased Radius, and leaves a trail of Fire as it travels if close enough to the ground, dealing Incendiary Damage over time. Causing a Detonation or damaging an enemy with Conflangarang will restore Forgeskill Cooldown.
Dealing Incendiary Damage with Guns increases Cryo Damage for a Duration. Dealing Cryo Damage with Guns increases Incendiary Damage for a Duration.
Whenever Amon Freezes an enemy, Cryo Hazard is created under them, dealing Cryo Damage for a Duration.
Action Skill Damage has a Chance to Critically Hit and Burn enemies when it does.
Detonations partially Restore Amon's Shield and Ordnance Cooldown.
Whenever Amon deals Forgeskill Damage, he creates a Drone Singularity for a Duration.
Frost Axes apply Freeze on impact. Flame Axes now pass through enemies.
Amon gains increased Status Effect Damage and Hazard Damage.
Ordnance Damage has a Chance to Critically Hit, and Shock enemies when they do.
Elemental Bolts now Stagger enemies, and consume an additional Stack of Shock Affinity to Multiply Damage Dealt. Bosses cannot be Staggered, and Badasses have a reduced Chance to be Staggered.
Kill Skill. Amon Restores a percentage of Forgeskill Cooldown.

Forgewave is now Stormlance. Press Action Skill to throw a Forgespear, dealing Shock Ordnance Damage on impact, consuming Vengeance to increase Damage Dealt. Enemies damaged by Forgespear are Primed for a Duration, and will Detonate when they are damaged by a Forgeskill, dealing Shock Damage to the target, but none to nearby enemies. Detonations can also be caused by Gun Critical Hits, but deal less Damage. This effect can stack.
Whenever Amon deals Action Skill Damage, he consumes a Stack of Shock Affinity to cause an Elemental Bolt to strike that enemy, dealing Shock Damage.
While Hipfiring, Amon gains increased Fire Rate, but decreased Gun Handling. While Aiming, Amon gains increased Gun Damage and Gun Handling.
Kill Skill. Killing an enemy with Shock Damage will grant a Stack of Shock Affinity for a Duration. Shock Affinity Stacks grant increased Critical Hit Damage.

Firewall is now Wrathfall. Press and hold Action Skill to call down a Massive Forgesword to strike a target enemy, dealing Shock Ordnance Damage to enemies in the area. Wrathfall always Critically Hits.
Whenever Harlowe Freezes an enemy, she receives a Stack of Zero Point. For every Stack of Zero Point, her Action Skill Duration freezes enemies for a short time.
Whenever Harlowe applies a Status Effect to an enemy, she gains a chance to apply that Status Effect to each Entangled enemy.

Harlowe's Flux Generator gains increased Radius. Additionally, whenever she retrieves Flux Generator, she creates a Cryo Hazard where her Flux Generator was located, and a Radiation Hazard wherever she next places her Flux Generator. Only one of each of these Hazards may be active at a time.
Whenever Harlowe shoots an Entangled enemy, she and all allies restore a portion of their Action Skill Cooldown.
Enemies inside Harlowe's Flux Generator lose all Elemental Resistances. Harlowe and her allies inside her Flux Generator gain increased Status Effect Chance.
Harlowe deals increased Gun Damage based on her Overshield. The more Overshield she has, the bigger the bonus.
Harlowe gains increased Cryo Efficiency.
Harlowe gains increased Maximum Shield Capacity and increased Maximum Overshield Capacity.
Harlowe and her allies gain increased Reload Speed for every Entangled enemy.
Whenever Harlowe Entangles an enemy, she and her allies deal increased Critical Hit Damage.
Whenever Harlowe Irradiates an enemy, she gains increased Gun Damage. This effect can stack.
Harlowe deals increased Melee Damage and her Melee Attacks gain a chance to Entangle enemies.
Whenever Harlowe deals Radiation Damage to an enemy, she gains increased Action Skill Damage. This effect can stack.
Harlowe gains increased Reload Speed.
Harlowe gains increased Fire Rate.
Harlowe gains increased Elemental Damage and Status Effect Damage.
Whenever Harlowe's Shield breaks, she deals Radiation Damage to all Entangled enemies. Harlowe gains Overshield equal to the amount of Damage dealt this way.
Harlowe gains increased Radiation Damage.
Harlowe gains increased Action Skill Damage.
Harlowe gains increased Status Effect Chance.
Whenever Harlowe activates or retriggers an Action Skill, she gains increased Movement Speed.
Harlowe gains increased Status Effect Duration.

All Damage Harlowe's Unstable Energy Pocket deals to enemies is stored. Whenever it explodes, a portion of that Stored Damage is transferred to Harlowe's Gun, causing her to deal Bonus Radiation Damage.
Harlowe gains increased Maximum Shield Capacity and Shield Recharge Rate.
Whenever Harlowe applies a Status Effect to an enemy, she gains increased Action Skill Cooldown Rate.
Whenever Harlowe's Unstable Energy Pocket passes by an enemy, it loses a portion of its current Total Health and becomes Frozen.
Whenever Harlowe triggers or retriggers an Action Skill, she gains increased Fire Rate.
Harlowe gains increased Cryo Damage.
Harlowe gains Critical Hit Chance with all Skills. This chance increases every time Harlowe Entangles an enemy. This effect can stack.
Harlowe gains increased Gun Handling. This bonus is Doubled while an enemy is in Stasis.
After triggering or retriggering an Action Skill, Harlowe gains increased Gun Damage.

Whenever an enemy enters Stasis, spawn a homing Rejuvenating Projectile that targets Harlowe or her Allies once the enemy is Slammed, killed, or Stasis ends. The Rejuvenating Projectile grants decreased Action Skill Duration Rate and increased Action Skill Cooldown Rate for a Duration. If the target is in Fight for Your Life, they immediately gain Second Wind as if they killed an enemy.
Harlowe gains increased Elemental Damage, Status Effect Application Chance, and Cryo Effectiveness.
Harlowe gains increased Action Skill Cooldown Rate.
Whenever Harlowe Entangles an enemy, she gains Health Regeneration.
Kill Skill. Whenever Harlowe kills an Entangled enemy, automatically Entangle another nearby enemy.
Whenever Harlowe shoots an enemy with a Gun, bullets Ricochet off of that enemy onto all enemies in Stasis. If Harlowe Critically Hits an enemy, that enemy becomes Entangled.
Whenever Harlowe deals Cryo Damage, gain increased Action Skill Cooldown Rate.
While her Action Skill is Cooling Down, Harlowe deals Bonus Cryo Damage with her Melee Attacks. While her Action Skill is Active, Harlowe deals Bonus Radiation Damage with her Melee Attacks.
Harlowe deals increased Damage with all sources to Entangled enemies. Enemies inside of her Flux Generator take further increased Damage.
Whenever Harlowe Entangles an enemy, she gains increased Action Skill Damage, Action Skill Duration, and Action Skill Cooldown Rate. This effect can stack.
Harlowe deals Bonus Damage with Guns, Melee Attacks, and Action Skills while she has Overshield. The more Overshield she has, the bigger the bonus.

Charge Skill. Whenever Harlowe relocates her Flux Generator, it Teleports to a location in her crosshairs, consuming a Charge and creating a Shock Burst that deals Shock Damage to enemies inside it, grants a free Second Wind to allies, and Heals allies within the Flux Generator.
Harlowe gains increased Status Effect Chance. Whenever Harlowe applies a Status Effect to an enemy, it becomes Entangled.
Harlowe's Flux Generator gains increased Action Skill Damage. This effect is increased based on how many Allies and Enemies are inside of her Flux Generator.
Convert all CHROMA Accelerator Damage to Cryo Damage.
Whenever Harlowe Entangles an enemy, she gains a chance to Entangle another nearby enemy.
Whenever Harlowe Freezes an Entangled enemy, it deals Cryo Damage to itself and all other Entangled enemies.
Harlowe gains Lifesteal against Frozen enemies. If she's at full Health, she gains Overshield instead.
Whenever Harlowe kills an enemy with her Unstable Energy Pocket and when she kills an Entangled enemy while her Unstable Energy Pocket is active, refund a portion of her next Action Skill Cooldown.
Whenever Harlowe Freezes an enemy, she gains increased Action Skill Cooldown rate. This effect can stack.
Harlowe gains increased Skill Damage.

Harlowe's Unstable Energy Pocket bounces as it travels and can no longer be manually detonated. Each time it bounces, it creates a Radiation Explosion. Whenever it strikes an enemy, it changes direction and bounces towards another enemy.
Harlowe gains increased Action Skill Duration for every Entangled enemy.
Kill Skill. Killing an Entangled enemy restores a portion of Harlowe's Action Skill Cooldown and Action Skill Duration.
Pressing Action Skillplaces an additional enemy in Stasis at the cost of Action Skill Duration. When Stasis ends, automatically Slam all enemies straight down.
Whenever Harlowe Critically Hits an enemy, Daze that enemy. Dazed enemies have decreased Movement Speed and Attack Speed. Daze can stack.
Harlowe's Guns deal Bonus Cryo Damage for every enemy she has in Stasis. This effect can stack.
Whenever Harlowe Dazes an enemy, she also Entangles them, and then she gains increased Movement Speed.
Whenever Harlowe Critically Hits an enemy, she briefly puts that enemy into Stasis. This form of Stasis lasts for a short duration, or until the enemy is shot again.

Entangled enemies take Bonus Radiation Damage from Entangle. Whenever Harlowe deals Radiation Gun Damage to an enemy, restore Action Skill Duration. Whenever Harlowe kills an enemy in Stasis, create a Radiation Nova. This Radiation Nova deals Damage based on remaining Action Skill Duration.
Whenever Harlowe Critically Hits an enemy, she gains a chance to Entangle it, and Refills a portion of her Gun's Magazine.
While her Shield is down, Harlowe gains increased Status Effect Chance.
Whenever Harlowe retriggers her Action Skill, the next shot fired from her Gun drains her Shield and deals Bonus Radiation Damage based on the amount drained.
Harlowe gains increased Gun Handling, which is further increased with every enemy in her Flux Generator.
Press and hold Melee Attack to make Harlowe swap places with her Flux Generator.
Harlowe's Critical Hits with Guns deal Bonus Radiation Damage.

Whenever Harlowe and her allies are inside the Flux Generator's Radius, they deal Bonus Cryo Damage. Whenever Harlowe and her allies leave the Flux Generator's Radius, they instead deal Bonus Radiation Damage for a Duration. Whenever Harlowe inflicts Cryo or Radiation Status Effects, that enemy becomes Entangled.

Harlowe's Flux Generator occasionally shoots Radiation Projectiles at nearby enemies outside of its radius. If these Projectiles Irradiate an enemy, the Flux Generator then drags them within its radius. Retrigger: Harlowe's Flux Generator creates a Singularity burst that drags in nearby enemies and increases Action Skill Power.
Harlowe deals Bonus Radiation Damage to Entangled enemies.
As Harlowe's Unstable Energy Pocket travels, it shoots Radiation Darts at enemies. Whenever Harlowe Entangles an enemy while her Action Skill is active, automatically Irradiate that enemy.
Whenever Harlowe Irradiates an enemy, create a Radiation Explosion on that enemy.
Whenever Harlowe damages an Irradiated enemy or an Entangled enemy, shoot a Radiation Dart at another enemy.
Harlowe gains Critical Hit Chance with Guns against Irradiated enemies.
Harlowe gains increased Radiation Damage and Irradiation Chance.
Harlowe's Unstable Energy Pocket pulls enemies along as it passes by, and its detonation deals increased Damage for every enemy it has already hit.
Kill Skill. Killing an Irradiated enemy or killing an enemy with Radiation Damage leaves behind a Radiation Hazard.
Whenever Harlowe Slams an enemy, create a Singularity on that enemy, followed by a Cryo Explosion.

All Damage Dealt to enemies in Stasis is stored. Whenever an enemy is Slammed or Stasis ends, create a Cryo Explosion based on all Stored Damage and centered on that enemy, and also automatically Freeze other enemies nearby.

Whenever Harlowe Freezes an enemy, create an Endothermic Aura that deals constant Cryo Damage to enemies around it. Harlowe's Endothermic Aura deals increased Damage based on her Overshield. The more full, the greater the bonus
Whenever Harlowe deals Cryo Damage with an Action Skill, she gains a chance to Freeze that enemy.
Whenever Harlowe Freezes an enemy, she gains increased Action Skill Cooldown Rate.
All Cryo Damage Harlowe deals gains Lifesteal. If Harlowe's Health is full, she gains Overshield instead.
Whenever Harlowe deals non-Cryo Damage to an Entangled enemy, she deals Bonus Cryo Damage to that enemy. If she deals Cryo Damage to an Entangled enemy, she deals increased bonus Damage.
Kill Skill. Harlowe deals Bonus Cryo Damage with all sources.
Harlowe and her allies gain Lifesteal against Entangled enemies.
Harlowe's Flux Generator occasionally throws Grenades. If Harlowe or her Allies are inside the Flux Generator and have a Grenade equipped, it throws a copy of that Grenade.
Whenever Harlowe's Action Skill damages an enemy, restore a portion of her and all allies' Shield Capacity. If their Shields are full, gain Overshield instead.
Harlowe gains increased Critical Hit Damage. Whenever an enemy is damaged by Harlowe's Action Skill, the next shot on that enemy will be an Automatic Critical Hit.

Harlowe spawns a HALO Sidekick for each ally instead of her Flux Generator. HALO Sidekicks automatically fly to each ally and hover near them, granting increased Gun Damage, Fire Rate, and Reload Speed. Action Skill Retrigger: Overload Harlowe's HALO Sidekicks to increase their effects. This effect stacks. While Overloaded, Harlowe's Action Skill Duration drains faster.
While Harlowe's Action Skill is Cooling Down, she grants herself and her allies increased Reload Speed and Fire Rate.

When Harlowe activates her Flux Generator, she gains Damage Reduction and increased Action Skill Duration for each Entangled enemy and each additional enemy she Entangles while her Action Skill is active.
Harlowe and her allies gain Ricochet Chance against Entangled enemies. Critical Hits Double this chance. Ricochets have Reduced Damage.
Whenever Harlowe activates CHROMA Accelerator, drain her Shield and Amp her next Unstable Energy Pocket.
Whenever Harlowe's Unstable Energy Pocket detonates, it Splits into several smaller, fast moving Unstable Energy Pockets.
Whenever Harlowe enters Fight For Your Life, she throws a free Unstable Energy Pocket at a nearby enemy - if there are any.
Kill Skill. Whenever Harlowe kills an enemy with a Skill, Restore a portion of her Shield Capacity.
Whenever Harlowe damages an enemy with a Skill, she gains increased Skill Damage. This effect can stack.
Melee Override. Harlowe attaches an Unstable Energy Pocket to her fist, and slams it into an enemy in front of her.
For every enemy her Action Skill damages, Harlowe gains increased Gun Damage when her Action Skill ends. This effect can stack.

Charge Skill. CHROMA Accelerator gains Charges as Harlowe keeps it readied for the Duration of CHROMA Accelerator or until all Charges are used. Holding the Action Skill ends The Shattering Light early and refunds a portion of the Cooldown for every Charge remaining. Press Action Skill: Fire a fast-moving Unstable Energy Pocket, consuming a Charge.
Whenever Harlowe deals Splash Damage to an Entangled enemy, she gains a chance to trigger Entangled Damage Share again.
Kill Skill. Killing an Entangled enemy causes an Elemental Explosion on all other Entangled enemies.
Kill Skill. Whenever Harlowe kills an Entangled enemy, she gains a chance to instantly fully restore her Action Skill.
Every time Harlowe Slams an enemy, gain increased Slam Damage and Slam Damage Radius. Enemies in Stasis take Decreased Damage. Press Action Skill to Slam all enemies in Stasis straight down.
Harlowe gains increased Splash Damage.
Whenever an enemy Harlowe has in Stasis dies, a new enemy is automatically added to Stasis. When this happens, Harlowe's Action Skill Duration resets, however it drains quicker.
Kill Skill. Killing an Entangled enemy restores a portion of Harlowe's Action Skill Duration.
Whenever Rafa throws a Grenade, he gains increased Action Skill Cooldown Rate.
Overdrive Skill. Rafa gains increased Gun Handling and Action Skill Handling while Overdrive is active. The longer Overdrive has been active, the greater the bonus.
Kill Skill. Whenever Rafa kills an enemy, he gains increased Ordnance Cooldown Rate.
APOPHIS Lance gains an Additional Charge. Additionally, whenever Rafa consumes a set minimum number of Charges, he gains increased Action Skill Potency.
The first shot fired from a fully-loaded Magazine gains increased Damage.
Overdrive Skill. Rafa Regenerates Ammo while Overdrive is active.
Whenever Rafa activates or retriggers an Action Skill, his gun consumes no Ammo.
Activating an Action Skill grants Rafa Health Regeneration.
Whenever Rafa Reloads his current Gun, he gains increased Action Skill Cooldown Rate. This effect can stack.
Rafa gains increased Reload Speed.
Whenever Rafa consumes an APOPHIS Lance Charge, he gains increased Action Skill Cooldown Rate. This bonus is increased for every APOPHIS Lance Charge consumed.
Overdrive Skill. Rafa gains increased Fire Rate, which is increased even further while Overdrive is active.

While Peacebreaker Cannons are active, Rafa and his Allies Regenerate Ammo into their Magazine. Rafa's Peacebreaker Cannons deal Bonus Incendiary Damage based on how full his Gun is, and his Turrets shoot Exploding Bullets while his Magazine is full. Pressing Action Skill while Peacebreaker Cannons are active causes Rafa's shots to consume no Ammo, but causes his Action Skill Duration to drain faster.
Kill Skill. Killing an enemy restores Shields based on Rafa's Maximum Health Capacity.
Rafa and his Peacebreaker Cannons gain increased Fire Rate.
Rafa deals increased damage from all sources. The fuller Rafa's Shields are, the greater the bonus. While Rafa's Shields are at Maximum Capacity, double the bonus.
Whenever Rafa activates an Action Skill, he restores a portion of his Maximum Shield Capacity. If his Shields are already full, he gains Overshield instead.

Rafa's Peacebreaker Cannons gain increased Critical Hit Chance. Pressing Action Skill while Peacebreaker Cannons are active causes them to double their Critical Hit Chance and gain increased Critical Hit Damage, while also causing his Action Duration to drain faster. Kill Skill. Killing an enemy causes Rafa to restore Action Skill Duration, while also causing his Action Skill Duration to drain faster.
Whenever Rafa Critically Hits an enemy, Action Skill Duration is restored.
Rafa gains increased Skill Damage.
Overdrive Skill. Rafa gains increased Damage Reduction while Overdrive is active.
Overdrive Skill. Rafa gains increased Shield Recharge Rate and improved Shield Regen Delay while Overdrive is active.
Rafa gains increased Gun Damage.
Whenever Rafa's Shields break after being fully recharged, spawn a free Grenade. If he has a Grenade equipped, use that Grenade instead.

Whenever Rafa kills an enemy while Arc-Knives are active, restore a portion of his Health. Whenever Rafa gains Health, deal Bonus Corrosive Damage with all attacks, and gain increased Movement Speed. This effect can stack.

Arc-Knives do not end when their Duration runs out. Instead they only end if Rafa enters Fight For Your Life or activates Blade Fury. While Arc-Knives' duration is depleted, Rafa loses Health instead. Whenever Rafa damages an enemy, he gains Overshield.
Whenever Rafa damages an enemy with a Melee Attack, his Melee Attacks gain Critical Hit Chance. This chance stacks, and all Stacks are removed whenever Rafa Critically Hits an enemy.
Dealing Melee Damage grants Rafa a Stack of Diamond Hands. Gain increased Gun Damage for every Stack of Diamond Hands. Once Rafa deals Gun Damage, Stacks begin to decay quickly until they run out.
A portion of Rafa's Maximum Health Capacity is converted into Maximum Shield Capacity.
Overdrive Skill. Overdrive grants Rafa increased Movement Speed.
Rafa gains increased Gun Damage and Melee Damage
Whenever Rafa's Shields break, he instantly gains a portion of his Shield Maximum Capacity as Overshield. This Skill cannot be used again until Rafa next activates his Action Skill.
Kill Skill. Killing an enemy freezes Overdrive's Duration.
Rafa's Action Skills deal Bonus Corrosive Damage. The longer the Skill has been active, the greater the Bonus Damage.
Rafa's Melee Critical Hits gain Lifesteal.
Rafa gains increased Gun Damage and Skill Damage. The lower his Health, the greater the bonuses.
Whenever Rafa Shocks an enemy, all shots fired at that enemy are Critical Hits.
Overdrive Skill. Rafa gains Critical Hit Chance with his Guns while Overdrive is active.
Rafa gains increased Status Effect Chance, and also gains further increased Shock Chance.
Whenever Rafa Slides, his Action Skill deals Bonus Shock Damage, and he also deals increased Critical Hit Damage.
Whenever Rafa applies a Status Effect, his Action Skills consume no Duration, and APOPHIS Lance consumes no Charges.
APOPHIS Lance gains Critical Hit Chance. Whenever Rafa damages an enemy with APOPHIS Lance, he gains further increased Critical Hit Chance.

APOPHIS Lance is now a close-range Shocking Taser. Pressing and holding Action Skill causes Rafa to deal Shock Damage in an arc in front of him. The longer Rafa holds this attack, the greater Damage it deals.
Indirect Projectiles gain increased Damage. Indirect Projectiles include all Action Skill Weapons, Thrown Guns, and Projectiles not fired from your Gun.

Rafa's Peacebreaker Cannons are replaced with Shotguns that deal increased Damage and have an increased Pellet Count. Additionally, Rafa's Turrets gain a chance to Ricochet off of targets. Ricochets deal Reduced Damage, and Critical Hits always Ricochet.
All Indirect Projectiles deal Bonus Incendiary Damage. If the Indirect Projectile already deals Incendiary Damage, double the Bonus Damage.
Pressing Action Skill while Peacebreaker Cannons are active causes them to fire two Firebombs that deal Incendiary Damage in a large area. Killing enemies partially restores this Skill's Cooldown.
Rafa's Indirect Projectiles gain Lifesteal.
Rafa's Indirect Projectiles gain a chance to Ricochet.

Melee Override. Press ability to lob a STRM Glider at an enemy. Once it reaches its targets, it explodes and deals Incendiary Damage in an area based on the amount of Ammo in Rafa's Gun when he threw the STRM Glider.
While moving, shots have a chance to Ricochet off of Rafa. This chance is doubled while Sliding.

Whenever Rafa applies a Mark or Critically Hits an enemy with his Action Skill, they explode in Corrosive Lobbed Projectiles. The longer Rafa's Action Skill has been active, the more Corrosive Projectiles are spawned.
Rafa gains increased Splash Damage and Critical Hit Chance.

Activating Blade Fury causes Rafa to spin his blades, creating a Singularity that draws in all Marked enemies and other nearby enemies while dealing continuous Shock Damage. Whenever this attack kills an enemy, Overdrive grants increased Action Skill Cooldown Rate.
Marked enemies killed by Rafa leave behind a Corrosive Hazard.
Pressing ability while Arc-Knives are active or Rafa retriggers his Action Skill drains a portion of Rafa's Shields, and deals that much Shock Damage to nearby enemies.
Whenever Rafa deals Splash Damage, deal Bonus Shock Damage based on the Damage Dealt.
Attacks made with Arc-Knives deal Shock Melee Splash Damage. Rafa gains increased Splash Damage.

Whenever Rafa damages an enemy with an Action Skill, place a Remote Detonator on that enemy. Remote Detonators gain increased Damage and increased Splash Radius for every Remote Detonator on an enemy. Remote Detonators automatically explode after a delay or whenever the enemy they're attached to dies. Ordnance Override. Detonate all Remote Detonators.
Whenever Rafa triggers or retriggers an Action Skill, send one of his STRM Gliders at an enemy in his view. Once it arrives, it explodes in a Corrosive Explosion equal to its remaining health.

Whenever Rafa activates an Ordnance, spawn STRM Gliders that hover near him. As he takes Damage, transfer some of it to his STRM Gliders. Once a STRM Glider receives too much Damage, it explodes, dealing Corrosive Splash Damage to nearby enemies.
Overdrive Skill. Rafa gains increased Gun Damage while Overdrive is active. This bonus is doubled while Rafa is charging APOPHIS Lance.
Whenever Rafa kills an enemy with his APOPHIS Lance, spawn a free Grenade on that enemy. If Rafa has a Grenade equipped, spawn a copy of that Grenade instead.

APOPHIS Lance now fires a Corrosive Blob that leaves a Corrosive Hazard and Splits into several smaller Projectiles whenever it detonates. The more Charges APOPHIS Lance consumes at once, the more it Splits.
Rafa gains increased Ordnance Damage after Reloading his Gun. This bonus stacks.

Rafa's Peacebreaker Cannons are replaced with a Shock Beam and a Corrosive Beam. Each beam automatically locks onto enemies in your view, and may lock onto different enemies. Whenever Rafa applies a Status Effect, gain increased Action Skill Damage.
While Aiming with a Gun, Rafa deals Bonus Shock Damage. Each time Rafa hits an enemy this way, deal increased Bonus Damage until he zooms out. This effect can stack.
Rafa's Ordnances deal Bonus Damage in his current Gun's Element.
Enemies damaged by Rafa's Peacebreaker Cannons have increased Status Effect Chance.
Whenever Rafa inflicts a Status Effect on an enemy, he gains increased Action Skill Cooldown Rate and improved Action Skill Duration Rate. This effect can stack.

Rafa's Peacebreaker Cannons also deal Ordnance Damage, and he deals increased Ordnance Damage while Peacebreaker Cannons are active. Pressing Action Skill while Peacebreaker Cannons are active causes them to disconnect from Rafa and become a Turret Companion that begins firing at enemies in place. Additionally, it will occasionally fire Grenades at its targets. If Rafa has a Grenade equipped, it copies that Grenade. Pressing Action Skill again returns the Turret Companion to Rafa's back.
Rafa's Guns gain a chance to Ricochet off of enemies with Status Effects. Ricochet Damage is based on the Damage Dealt.
The first shot fired from Rafa's fully-loaded Magazine deals Bonus Corrosive Damage.
Rafa gains increased Ordnance Cooldown Rate.
Whenever Rafa Critically Hits an enemy, he gains a chance to spawn a Free Grenade. If Rafa has a Grenade equipped, spawn a Grenade based on that.
Overdrive Skill. Rafa deals Bonus Damage with Skills and Ordnances in the Element of his current Gun while Overdrive is active.
A portion of all Incendiary Damage Rafa deals also deals Bonus Incendiary Ordnance Damage.

Overdrive Skill. While Overdrive is active, Rafa may use Grenades during Ordnance Cooldown at the cost of Health. Every time a Grenade is used this way, it costs more Health until Rafa's Grenade fully cools down.

While Arc-Knives are active, Rafa's Exo-Suit stores all Damage Dealt to him. The Exo-Suit then heats up and constantly deals a small amount of Incendiary Damage to him. Additionally, Rafa's Melee Attacks deal Bonus Incendiary Damage. A portion of all Damage Dealt to Rafa is also dealt to enemies he has Marked. Using Blade Fury causes Rafa to consume all Stored Damage, and deals Bonus Incendiary Damage based on Stored Damage. A portion of all Damage dealt this way is returned to Rafa as Health.

Whenever Rafa activates his Dash Attack, he leaves behind a Grenade. If he has a Grenade equipped, use that Grenade instead. Enemies damaged by these Grenades become Marked. Whenever Rafa applies a Mark to an enemy, apply an additional Mark.
Whenever Rafa deals Ordnance Damage, he also deals increased Gun Damage and Melee Damage. This effect can stack.
Overdrive Skill. Rafa gains increased Fire Rate and increased Reload Speed while Overdrive is active.
APOPHIS Lance gains increased Projectile Radius and Projectile Speed. PROJECT: Gorgon gains increased Number of Chains.
Whenever Rafa damages an enemy with a Skill, he gains a Stack of Jaque. For every Stack of Jaque, he gains increased Overdrive Bonuses. Whenever Overdrive ends, he loses all Stacks.
Overdrive Skill. Rafa gains increased Gun Handling and Action Skill Handling while Overdrive is active.
When Overdrive ends, convert all Jaque Stacks into Mate Stacks. Gain increased Action Skill Cooldown Rate for every Stack of Mate. Once Rafa's Action Skill is readied, lose all Stacks of Mate.
Whenever Rafa deals Damage with an Action Skill to an enemy, he gains a chance to deal that Damage again.

APOPHIS Lance is now a Laser that passes through enemies, dealing Incendiary Damage. Pressing and holding Action Skill causes the Laser to deal increased Damage and Chain to more Enemies as it consumes Charges.
Overdrive Skill. Rafa gains increased Splash Damage while Overdrive is active.

Overdrive Skill. While Overdrive is active, Rafa gains increased Movement Speed, and gains Health Regeneration. While Overdrive is not active, Rafa takes increased Damage, and gains increased Action Skill Cooldown Rate.
Overdrive gains increased Duration.
Kill Skill. Double all Overdrive bonuses.
Overdrive Skill. Rafa gains increased Gun Damage, but decreased Gun Handling. These Effects are based on how long Overdrive has been active.
Pressing Action Skill while Peacebreaker Cannons are active causes them to fire a volley of Homing Missiles at enemies in view, at the cost of Action Skill Duration.
Rafa's Peacebreaker Cannons are replaced with Rockets that deal Splash Damage.

Arc-Knives' Dash Attack is replaced by Caustic Leap. Pressing Action Skill causes Rafa to leap forward and create a Caustic Hazard wherever he lands. Whenever a Mark is removed from an enemy, it explodes into a Corrosive Nova.
Rafa gains increased Skill Damage with all Skills. The longer his Action Skill has been active, the greater the bonus. This effect can stack.
Rafa deals increased Corrosive Damage while his Action Skill is active. The longer it has been active, the greater the bonus. This effect can stack.
Rafa gains increased Action Skill Duration.

Whenever Rafa performs a Melee Attack while Arc-Knives are active, fire an Acid STRM Glider at an enemy in his view. Acid STRM Gliders deal Corrosive Splash Damage based on the number of total Marked enemies. Additionally, killing an enemy while Arc-Knives are active restores Action Skill Duration. Activating Blade Fury causes Rafa to fire a volley of Acid STRM Gliders in front of him and end Arc-Knives.
Pressing Action Skill during Arc-Knives grants increased Overdrive Duration. This bonus is reset whenever Rafa activates an Action Skill.
Overdrive Skill. Rafa gains Health Regeneration based on how much Overdrive time is remaining.
Command Skill. Press and hold Action Skill to Command Trouble to Blink Strike target enemy, dealing Damage. Blink Strike always Critically Strikes enemies who have less than 50% of their Health.
Vex deals increased Action Skill Damage the higher her Health.
Vex and her Minion(s) gain increased Melee Damage and Ordnance Damage.
Vex gains Bonus Kinetic Damage with Guns while her Action Skill is active.
Kill Skill. Restore a percentage of Trouble's Command Skill Cooldown and Respawn Cooldown.
Kill Skill. Restore a percentage of Action Skill Duration.
Vex and her Minion(s) gain increased Movement Speed and Damage Reduction.
Vex's Kill Skills gain increased Effectiveness.
While Vex has Overshield, she and her Minion(s) gain Health Regeneration.
Kill Skill. Vex and her Minion(s) gain Overshield.

Command Skill. Press and hold Action Skill to Command Trouble to explode himself, dealing Ordnance Damage to all nearby enemies and restoring Health to Vex. While Phase Phamiliar is active, sacrifice a percentage of his Maximum Health Capacity instead.
Vex and her Minion(s) gain Critical Hit Damage.
Vex's Minion(s) gain increased Maximum Health Capacity. Vex gains increased Gun Damage for a Duration after Commanding Trouble.
Activate Kill Skills whenever Vex's Minion(s) die.
Vex and her Minion(s) gain increased Gun Damage.
Spawning a Reaper grants Vex and her Minion(s) Health Regeneration for a Duration. Spawning a Specter grants Vex and her Minion(s) Critical Hit Chance for a Duration. Both effects can stack.
Vex's Melee Attacks apply Curse to hit enemies, making them take Kinetic Status Effect Damage any time they take Gun Damage.
Curse Damage now triggers on Minion Melee Damage, and deals increased Damage when it's triggered by a Critical Hit.
Vex and her Minion(s) gain increased Melee Damage and Maximum Health Capacity.
Minion Skill. Specters gain the ability to use Ghast Blast, dealing Gun Damage to all nearby enemies on impact. Specters will use Ghast Blast on spawn, and after they Reload.
Kill Skill. Vex and her Minion(s) gain increased Fire Rate for a Duration. This effect can stack.
Kill Skill. Vex and her Minion(s) deal increased Damage. This effect can stack.
Kill Skill. Vex gains increased Action Skill Cooldown Rate. This effect can stack.
Vex and her Minion(s) gain Reload Speed based on the fullness of her Health.
Vex and her Minion(s) gain increased Status Effect Damage.
Kill Skill. Vex and her Minion(s) restore Health.

Gun and Skill Critical Hits have a chance to apply Bleed, causing Kinetic Status Effect Damage over time for a Duration. Bleed is affected by Status Effect Application Chance, and is itself considered a Status Effect. This effect can stack.
Vex gains increased Action Skill Duration and Attunement Duration.

Vex deals Status Effect Damage to nearby enemies over time and gains Overshield for each enemy affected. Kill Skill. Killing an enemy while Incarnate is active will grant a Stack of Energy Vampire, increasing Status Effect Damage. Stacks are lost when Incarnate ends. This effect can stack
When Vex uses a Repkit, she and her Minion(s) gain increased Movement Speed and Fire Rate for a Duration.
Instead of causing a Phase Explosion, Vex launches a Geistwave, dealing Ordnance Damage to enemies it passes through. Each affected enemy takes increased Damage for a Duration.
Kill Skill. Vex and her Minion(s) gain increased Gun Damage for a Duration. This effect can stack.
Vex's Kill Skills gain increased Max Stacks.
Kill Skill. Vex gains increased Critical Hit Damage and Gun Handling. This effect can stack.
Kill Skill. Restores Repkit Cooldown.
Attunement Skill. While Vex is Attuned to Kinetic, she gains Lifesteal and increased Reload Speed. These effects persist for a Duration after Attunement is switched.
Vex gains increased Kinetic Damage and Kinetic Status Effect Damage.
Vex's Gun Damage gains Critical Hit Chance against any part of enemies.
Vex gains increased Splash Damage. Double this effect when an Action Skill is active.
Whenever Vex uses an Ordnance, she gains Overshield, and also gains increased Fire Rate for a Duration.
Vex gains increased Ordnance Damage. A perfect of Vex's Ordnance Damage increases Minion Damage.
Vex and her Minion(s) gain increased Maximum Overshield Capacity and Overshield Duration. While Vex has Overshield, she and her Minion(s) gain increased Damage Dealt.

Trouble now Taunts enemies, making them more likely to target him. Command Skill. Press and hold Action Skill to Command Trouble to charge target enemy, dealing Melee Damage in a radius on impact, and creating a Singularity for a Duration.
Attunement Kill Skill. While Vex is Attuned to Cryo, killing an enemy restore Ammo and Ordnance Cooldown. Effects persist for a Duration after Attunement is switched.

Kill Skill. Killing an enemy with Ordnance Damage or an Action Skill will spawn an Explosive Remnant that deals Cryo Ordnance Damage to nearby enemies. Explosive Remnant gains increased Damage based on Overkill Damage.
Vex gains increased Cryo Damage and Cryo Status Effect Damage.
While Phase Phamiliar is active, Trouble gains an Elemental Aura, dealing Ordnance Damage over time to nearby enemies.

Attunement Kill Skill. While Vex is Attuned to Corrosive, killing an enemy creates a Haunting Remnant Minion for a Duration that seeks our nearby enemies, dealing Corrosive Status Effect Damage over time. Kill Skill. Restore Haunting Remnant's Duration, if active.
Whenever Vex Dodges, she creates a Specter nearby and becomes Invisible for a Duration, or until her next Gun Shot.
Specters gain a copy of Vex's currently-equipped Gun for a Duration. Only one Specter can have a copied Gun at a time, and spawning a new Specter will remove the copied Gun from the previous Specter.
Status Effect Damage gains a chance to Critically Hit.
Vex gains increased Corrosive Damage and Corrosive Status Effect Damage.
When Vex or her Minion(s) apply a Status Effect, apply another random Elemental Status Effect.
When Vex swaps her current Gun, her new Gun has its Ammo partially Refilled.

Minion Skill. Specters cast Wither on an enemy when they Spawn, dealing Status Effect Damage over time, and increasing Damage Taken for a Duration. Can stack once per Elemental Type. Kill Skill. Killing a Withered enemy allows Specters to use Wither again.
Vex gains increased Gun Damage the more full her Shield and gains Damage Reduction the less full her Health.

Phase Explosion and Eldritch Blast create Hazards, dealing Damage over time for a Duration. Eldritch Blast is now Homing. If it hits an airborne enemy, it bursts after a delay, dealing Damage to other nearby enemies.
When Vex deals Gun Damage, there is a chance to spawn a Radioactive Hazard, dealing Radiation Damage over time.
Vex gains increased Action Skill Cooldown Rate and Ordnance Cooldown Rate based on the fullness of her Shield.
Vex gains increased Radiation Damage and Radiation Status Effect Damage.
Phase Explosion and Eldritch Blast restore Shield for each enemy hit and deal increased Damage based on Vex's current Shield.
Attunement Skill. While Vex is Attuned to Radiation, she gains increased Splash Damage and Maximum Shield Capacity. These effects persist for a Duration after Attunement is switched.
When Vex uses a Repkit, she gains increased Shield Regeneration for a Duration.
Trouble now gains a Chance to create an Illusion near the enemy when dealing Damage. Critical Hits have double that chance. Illusions become Badasses while Phase Phamiliar is active.
Vex gains increased Elemental Damage. Double this effect when an Action Skill is active.
Vex and her Minion(s) deal increased Critical Hit Damage to enemies who have less than a set percentage of their Health.
Minion Damage gains Critical Hit Chance against any part of enemies.
Whenever Vex or her Minion(s) Critically Hit, there is a chance to restore Action Skill Cooldown.

Kill Skill. Vex and her Minion(s) gain increased Damage Dealt, but Vex also gains increased Damage Taken for a Duration. Stacks are lost when Vex Dodges or enters Fight For Your Life. This effect can stack.
Trouble gains the ability to Tail Whip, dealing damage in an area over 2 hits.

Trouble gains a chance to Critically Hit with all attacks. Command Skill. Press and hold Action Skill to Command Trouble to summon Phase Daggers overhead that fire at nearby enemies, dealing Melee Damage on impact.

Attunement Skill. While Vex is Attuned to Incendiary, Vex and her Minion(s) gain increased Critical Hit Damage and Status Effect Application Chance. These effects persist for a Duration after Attunement is switched.
Vex gains increased Incendiary Damage and Incendiary Status Effect Damage.

Press and hold ability to spawn a Grim Reader that drains nearby enemies, dealing Status Effect Damage over time, and regenerating Health for each drained enemy. When an enemy dies while being drained, there is a chance a new Reaper will be spawned.
Melee Override. Vex now throws a Phase Dagger from her offhand that deals Melee Damage to enemies hit. Phase Daggers can Critically Hit. Kill Skill. Haruspex's Cooldown is reset.

Minion Skill. Reapers gain the ability to use Hellish Harvest, dealing Melee Damage 3 times in a large area around themselves and regenerate Health for each enemy hit. Reapers will use Hellish Harvest on spawn, and every third time they Melee Attack.
Haruspex now throws multiple Phase Daggers from both hands in a fan pattern. Killing an enemy now only refunds a portion of Haruspex's Cooldown.

Whenever Vex deals Gun Damage or Melee Damage, gain a Stack of Recurrence, which increases her and her Minions' Gun Damage and Melee Damage. Stacks of Recurrence are lost if a new Stack has not been gained for a Duration. This effect can stack.
Melee Damage dealt by Vex or her Minion(s) has a chance to deal Incendiary Melee Damage.
Whenever Vex deals Gun Damage, she gains a Stack of Drink Full, increasing her Fire Rate. Stacks of Drink Full are lost if a new Stack has not been gained for a Duration. This effect can stack.
Kill Skill. Vex and Minion(s) gain Elemental Damage for a Duration. This effect can stack.
Vex's Skill Damage gains Critical Hit Chance against any part of enemies.
Chance to Activate Kill Skills when Critically Hitting enemies.
Vex gains increased Magazine Size and Gun Switch Speed. Double this effect when an Action Skill is active.
Whenever Vex would enter Fight For Your Life, she immediately gets a Second Wind, becomes Invisible for a Duration, and causes a Phase Explosion.

Eldritch Blast is now a Charge Skill (3). Activating Eldritch Blast consumes all Charges to Ricochet on hitting an enemy. Will Ricochet once for each Charge consumed. Eldritch Blast's Cooldown reduction from Gun Damage is doubled.

Dealing Damage with Eldritch Blast or Phase Explosion will fully Refill Ammo of Vex's current Gun, and grants a stack of Witchy Trigger Finger, increasing Gun Damage for a Duration. Stacks of Witchy Trigger Finger persist even after Incarnate ends. This effect can stack.

Command Skill. Press and hold Action Skill to Command Trouble to enter Beast Mode, becoming Immune to Damage and gaining increased Minion Attack Speed and Movement Speed for a Duration. Kill Skill. Extends Beast Mode's Duration.
When Vex deals Gun Damage, there is a Chance to spawn a Spark Remnant that will seek out a nearby enemy and explode, dealing Shock Minion Damage to other nearby enemies.
Kill Skill. Vex's Minion(s) gain Bonus Shock Damage. This effect can stack.
Kill Skill. Vex and her Minion(s) gain Lifesteal for a Duration. This effect can stack.
When Vex uses a Repkit, she and her Minion(s) gain Bonus Damage with Guns and Melee Damage for a Duration. The Bonus Damage's Elemental Type is based on Vex's currently-equipped Attunement.
Attunement Skill. While Vex is Attuned to Shock, she gains increased Movement Speed and Gun Damage while moving. Effects persist for a Duration after Attunement is switched.
Vex gains increased Shock Damage and Shock Status Effect Damage.

Trouble will now Mark his current target, causing them to take increased Gun Damage from Vex. Kill Skill. When a Marked enemy is killed, Trouble gains a Stack of Unsealed for a Duration, granting Health Regeneration and increased Damage. While Phase Phamiliar is active, Unsealed effects are doubled. This effect can stack.
Vex gains a stack of Ancient Rites for each of her active Minion(s) every second, increasing Minion Damage. Stacks are lost after a Duration with no active Minion.

Minion Skill. Reapers can now use Banshee's Wail periodically, dealing Damage to nearby enemies and granting Overshield to nearby Allies. Damage increases apply to Overshield granted to Allies. Damaged enemies deal reduced Damage for a Duration

Vex can now equip two Augments, and gains the ability to use Dark Pact. Dark Pact: Press and hold ability while a Minion is active to fully restore Health of all Phase Clones, as well as granting increased Movement Speed and Minion Attack Speed for a Duration. Phase Clones do not lose Health over time while Dark Pact is active, and Health loss is reset when Dark Pack ends.
Whenever Vex takes Damage while at Low Health, Spawn a Reaper nearby.
Dead Ringer gains an additional Charge.
Vex gains increased Minion Damage. Minion Skills and Command Skills gain further increased Damage.
Vex and her Specters deal Bonus Damage with Gun Critical Hits. The Bonus Damage will be a random Elemental Type that changes on Reload, and that is increased for each active Attunement.
Reapers gain Maximum Health Capacity and will release a Spirit Bomb Remnant when they die, dealing Damage of their Elemental Type to nearby enemies.
Vex's Kill Skills gain increased Duration.
Vex gains increased Skill Damage.
Vex gains Bonus Kinetic Damage with Guns based on her current Lifesteal when her Health is full.
When Vex uses a Repkit, her next Gun Shot will become a Blood Shot, converting Damage Dealt into Kinetic Damage and dealing Bonus Damage based on her current Health.
Vex gains Lifesteal. Double this effect when an Action Skill is active.

Kill Skill. Killing an enemy while Incarnate is active will spawn a Soul Orb that deals Status Effect Damage over time to nearby enemies for a Duration. Use at range to detonate a Soul Orb, dealing Ordnance Damage to nearby enemies. Picking up a Soul Orb will restore Health and Action Skill Duration.
Kill Skill. Vex gains increased Maximum Health Capacity and Health Regeneration. This effect can stack.

Eldritch Blast now Sacrifices Health on use, but becomes a Piercing wave. Enemies hit take Damage, and Allies hit restore Health. Gain Bonus Damage and Healing based on Sacrificed Health. Eldritch Blast no longer has a Cooldown.
